routing_rule._doc: We use the existing manifest field `output_byte_size` divided by 4 as the token estimate. This matches `tools/run_diagnosis.py`'s context_tokens accounting on every locked grep/rtk-err-cat manifest in cilog-bench/results/* (verified ratio 1.000).

anti_leakage._doc: The router reads only the primary/fallback manifest rows for the case (case_id, context_path, output_byte_size, output_line_count, included_line_ranges, metadata.provider_error). It does not open ground_truth.json, eval_*.json, or any review label.
